emails.subject: Re: Important Legislation Watch:  H.R. 5415
emails.body: Re: Important Legislation Watch: H.R. 5415 Thanks for the info. That guy was truly out of control at the S.D. hearings. Glad to hear that his rotten bills aren't going anywhere. Who's gonna win the election? Hope you and your ankle are doing well. Best, Jeff

emails.subject: Re: Important Legislation Watch:  H.R. 5415
emails.body: Re: Important Legislation Watch: H.R. 5415 Thanks for the info. That guy was truly out of control at the S.D. hearings. Glad to hear that his rotten bills aren't going anywhere. Who's gonna win the election? Hope you and your ankle are doing well. Best, Jeff

emails.subject: Re: Important Legislation Watch:  H.R. 5415
emails.body: Jeff: Can't you keep your "California crazies" in California??!!?? As for the elections, I'm predicting the closest races in history with a Republican sweep of the White House, House and Senate. I guess that Baldwin actor guy will have to make good on his threat and "leave the country." I'm in the middle of physical therapy and praying I won't need the bone graft (come to find out it's "hardware" with a plate and six screws!!) But, I'm confined to wearing burkenstocks for the next month!!!! Not very fashionable!!!! Jeff Dasovich 10/12/2000 09:37 PM
